title: ECVEBench AgentInput
description: Runtime projection of a TaskInstance at a specific difficulty. Produced by the harness and fed to the agent. Contains no ground truth.

task_id.description: GHSA-level task identifier. Matches the task_id in tasks.jsonl.

difficulty.description: Difficulty level this input was rendered at.

ecosystem.description: Package ecosystem (e.g. npm, pip, maven, go, composer, rust, nuget, rubygems)

description.description: Scrubbed vulnerability description. No file or function references.
